'''safate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:picturably|picturably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:picturably|picturably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| safate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:safate|safate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safatesher|safatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safatesherĂ«m|safatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safatero|safatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safateshĂ«|safateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safateshĂ«m|safateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafatero|gokisafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafateshĂ«|gokisafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafateshĂ«m|gokisafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafankerom|gosafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafankeshĂ«|gosafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafankeshĂ«m|gosafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafankeya|gosafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safaterom|safaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safatemu|safatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safateya|safateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafaterom|gokisafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafatemu|gokisafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafateya|gokisafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:safafate|safafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safafatesher|safafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safafatesherĂ«m|safafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safafatero|safafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safafateshĂ«|safafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safafateshĂ«m|safafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafafatero|gokisafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafafateshĂ«|gokisafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafafateshĂ«m|gokisafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafafankerom|gosafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafafankeshĂ«|gosafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafafankeshĂ«m|gosafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafafankeya|gosafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safafaterom|safafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safafatemu|safafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safafateya|safafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafafaterom|gokisafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafafatemu|gokisafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafafateya|gokisafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠfĂŠte|sĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠfĂŠtesher|sĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠfĂŠtero|sĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠfĂŠtero|gokisĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠfĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠfĂŠtemu|sĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠfĂŠteya|sĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠfĂŠterom|gokisĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠfĂŠteya|gokisĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:saffafte|saffafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:saffaftesher|saffaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saffaftesherĂ«m|saffaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:saffaftero|saffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:saffafteshĂ«|saffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saffafteshĂ«m|saffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisaffaftero|gokisaffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisaffafteshĂ«|gokisaffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisaffafteshĂ«m|gokisaffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosaffafnkerom|gosaffafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosaffafnkeshĂ«|gosaffafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosaffafnkeshĂ«m|gosaffafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosaffafnkeya|gosaffafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:saffafterom|saffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saffaftemu|saffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:saffafteya|saffafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisaffafterom|gokisaffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisaffaftemu|gokisaffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisaffafteya|gokisaffafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
